overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic great hall with thousands of floating candles illuminating long dining tables where figures are seated. The scene features high vaulted ceilings, massive arched windows, and warm magical lighting mixing with natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with floating candles and dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from a fixed vantage point

notable_agents.action: groups of students seated at long dining tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: thousands of suspended candles floating at various heights throughout the hall providing warm illumination
tall arched stained glass windows at the far end of the hall letting in natural morning light
rows of long wooden tables covered with tablecloths and place settings extending down the hall
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along both sides of the hall
high gothic vaulted ceiling with intricate stonework disappearing into shadows above

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall filled with floating candles and long dining tables. Students are seated at the tables in the mid-ground while massive stone pillars line the sides and tall arched windows at the far end let in streams of natural light that mix with the warm candlelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a grand gothic great hall where magical warmth blends with natural daylight. It begins with a wide view of the cavernous space, capturing thousands of floating candles that cast a golden glow over long dining tables. As the eye moves through the mid-ground, students are seen seated among the flickering lights, framed by massive stone pillars that line the perimeter. The scene finally draws focus toward the far end of the hall, where tall arched windows allow streams of cool natural light to pierce through and mingle with the ambient candlelight.
